name: v4-breakout
description: TELOS self-challenge breakout engine: loops adversarial challenge + revision until a workstream claim survives or is honestly downgraded.

scripts.check: node --check breakout.mjs && node --check verifier.mjs && node --check mcp_client.mjs && node --check seat_router.mjs && node --check fight_memory.mjs && node --check live.mjs && node --check scripts/test-breakout.mjs && node --check scripts/test-council.mjs && node --check scripts/test-mcp-client.mjs && node --check scripts/test-seat-router.mjs && node --check scripts/test-fight-memory.mjs && node --check scripts/test-verifier.mjs && node --check scripts/test-live.mjs && node --check scripts/test-spec-boundary.mjs
scripts.test: npm run check && node scripts/test-breakout.mjs && node scripts/test-council.mjs && node scripts/test-mcp-client.mjs && node scripts/test-seat-router.mjs && node scripts/test-fight-memory.mjs && node scripts/test-verifier.mjs && node scripts/test-live.mjs && node scripts/test-spec-boundary.mjs
